name: 代数表达式
subject: math
domain_name: 表达式与方程 / Expressions & Equations / Expressions & Equations
curriculum_points: 6.EE.1 Write and evaluate numerical expressions involving whole-number exponents.
6.EE.2 Write, read, and evaluate expressions in which letters stand for numbers.
6.EE.3 Apply the properties of operations to generate equivalent expressions.
6.EE.4 Identify when two expressions are equivalent (i.e., when the two expressions name the same number regardless of which value is substituted into them).

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「代数表达式」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：6.EE.1 Write and evaluate numerical expressions involving whole-number exponents.…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：6.EE.2 Write, read, and evaluate expressions in which letters stand for numbers.… 对理解「代数表达式」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
